channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: SPLC got better returns than Nancy Pelosi and inverse Cramer combined!
item.author: @elonmusk

item.title: codex app 任务开的多了会变得非常非常卡。。而且无论怎么退出也无法恢复，是不是需要每次做完一件事情就把会话记录删除？有朋友遇到这个问题吗
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
Incentives explain outcomes.
Actually eliminating hatred would end the existence of “anti-hate” gr...
item.description:
Incentives explain outcomes.
Actually eliminating hatred would end the existence of “anti-hate” groups, so groups like SPLC amplified hatred instead to get more donations.
--- @elonmusk | ❤️ 281 | 🔁 64 | 💬 157 | 👁 21013
item.author: @elonmusk
